message:
test(integrity_guard): add 12 tests for error classification, throttling, and recovery paths

New tests cover previously untested logic in the integrity guard worker:

- full_check_interval: large value, small value clamp, saturating_mul overflow
- handle_integrity_error: non-recoverable errors don't update timestamp,
  recoverable errors set timestamp, rapid recovery throttling,
  8 recoverable message patterns (case-insensitive), 5 non-recoverable patterns,
  archive-aware vs file-only recovery path selection
- constants: sanity checks for interval/throttle values

Total integrity_guard tests: 3 → 15

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
